emails.subject: Confirmation of meeting
emails.body: Shirley, Sanjeev will come for an informal interview on Friday. He will talk for 10-15 minutes to the following people: 1. Stinson 2. Grant 3. Krishna 4. Tanya 5. Zimin 6. Paulo 7. Vasant 8. Amitava I shall talk to him for 5 minutes Vince Forwarded by Vince J Kaminski/HOU/ECT on 05/11/2000 07:59 AM "Khanna, Sanjeev" <sanjeev.khanna@et.pge.com> on 05/10/2000 11:29:27 PM
